title: `UNION ALL` doesn't work as expected
description: Using a statement with `UNION ALL` in some cases doesn't produce any results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_cases (id UInt64, caseid String, status UInt8 DEFAULT 1);
CREATE TABLE delivery (delivery_id UInt64, caseid String, delivery_date Date);
SELECT caseid, status FROM test_cases WHERE status = 1 UNION ALL SELECT caseid, CAST(NULL AS UInt8) FROM test_cases WHERE status = 0;
key_bug_features: `UNION ALL` fails to return expected results
